para1: We are a dedicated developer team working to bring Bengali to smart devices in a smarter form — we are KhiproTeam. We are working on multiple projects to make Bengali more efficient, faster, easier, and accessible for everyone — on devices, websites, writing, and reading.
para2: 'Khipro Compositional Layout' — our Bengali input method project. 'Shörolipi' — an unambiguous romanization system for Bengali. 'Bengali Localization Community' — a project to make Bengali localization and UI translations practical; and more coming soon.
